Modern social-first product photography with tactile editorial energy captured in 16:9, SCARLETT in clean white tank top with coral lipstick already applied sits at a crisp white vanity in a minimal neutral studio, leaning forward toward a microphone with her right hand extended mid-reach to lift a slim coral lipstick tube from its open minimal box, fingers just touching the matte surface with potential energy frozen in the moment muscles tensed and gaze directed slightly off-camera, bright natural window light pouring across the vanity creating clean directional shadows and crisp whites against soft beige tones throughout the sparse background, shallow depth of field with the hand and lipstick tube in sharp focus while the rest of the neutral studio softly blurs, high-key airy atmosphere with true-to-life color and a single pop of coral accent, eye-level slightly above angle with natural lens quality and minimal processing.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING - Bright window light pours across a crisp white vanity in a minimal neutral studio space
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
